understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spike tiles that cause instant failure. Each level provides 2 attempts of up to 50 turns each. The player must use movement and terrain manipulation to reach the goal efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: The player can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT. After moving horizontally, gravity (always DOWN) pulls the player to the lowest available y-coordinate until a solid tile is encountered. Clicks: The CLICK action targets a grid coordinate and removes any 'clickable tile' at that location, which can clear obstacles or create new falling paths. Clicks do not move the player. Hazards: Landing on a spike tile ends the attempt immediately. Coordinates are grid-based with [x, y] positions; y increases upward, so falling reduces y. The player has limited steps per attempt, and failing an attempt restarts the level with the failure noted.
